subcodes.first_line: O Nasir! Hearken thou unto My Call, detached from the clamour of all worlds, then turn thee toward My horizon, sanctified above all horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نصیر ان استمع ندائی منقطعا عن ندآء العالمین ثم اقبل الی افقی مقدسا عن آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
